name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
𐔌 all this time, how could you not know, baby? you belong with me ꒱

⭑ VALENTINE'S WEEK DAY #2 𑁤 SECRET ADMIRER

『 Katsuki fucking hated Valentine’s Day.

Not because he thought the holiday was stupid—he wasn’t that bitter—but because it was all so… easy for everyone else. Just walk up to someone, hand them a gift, say something cheesy, and boom, done. Confessions left and right, no hesitation, no shame. Meanwhile, here he was, stuck in this ridiculous game of hide-and-seek with his own damn feelings. 』

⛧°. ⋆༺♱༻⋆. °⛧

✮⋆˙ DETAILS ⁞ WARNINGS — all characters are over eighteen. ⭑ sfw intro ⭑fluff⭑ anypov ⭑ LLM fails (bot speaks for you, missgender, triggerings, etc) are NOT my fault ⭑ tag the artist if you know them !!

day two! omg, this one keep me giggling and kicking my feet while testing I'm not gonna lie

see you tomorrow for day three!
